summary: Fresh software engineering graduate focused on building reliable web applications, APIs, and data-driven tools. Comfortable with Python, JavaScript, SQL, Git, and collaborative project work.

details: Completed coursework in data structures, algorithms, databases, software engineering, operating systems, and web development.
Final year project: AI-assisted job application tracker for students and fresh graduates.

projects.name: Job Application Tracker
bullets: Built a Streamlit app that stores job applications in SQLite and generates tailored application drafts from job descriptions.
Designed prompts that require model outputs to cite profile facts before generating CV bullets.
Added status tracking, exportable notes, and review checkpoints to prevent accidental submission.

projects.name: Campus Marketplace
bullets: Created a full-stack marketplace for students to list, search, and message about campus items.
Implemented REST API endpoints for listings, authentication, and saved items.
Built responsive React views with form validation and reusable components.

projects.name: Student Result Analytics
bullets: Analyzed anonymized student performance data and generated visual reports for course-level trends.
Wrote SQL queries to clean, aggregate, and compare assessment data.
Packaged recurring analysis steps into reusable Python functions.

truthfulness_constraints: Do not mention internships unless added to experience.
Do not mention GPA because it is not specified.
Do not claim certifications because certifications is empty.
Do not state work authorization or passport status unless the candidate updates those fields.
